title: carex × kattaeana
intro: Carex × kattaeana, also known as Kattae's sedge, is a hybrid of the Carex and Carex buxbaumii plant species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex × kattaeana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Carex × kattaeana can be made by infusing the roots in hot water to create a tea, or by using it in salves and poultices to treat skin conditions.
